items.title: Hodgkinson holds off Broeders-Bol to win 800m
items.summary: Keely Hodgkinson secures her first Diamond League win of the season, beating Femke Broeders-Bol to place first in the women's 800m event at the London Stadium.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
